editionTitle: IB ACIO Daily Current Affairs — 22 July 2026
editionTitle_hi: आईबी एसीआईओ दैनिक करेंट अफेयर्स — 22 जुलाई 2026

articles.title: National Flag Adoption Day — 22 July 1947
articles.summary: Today marks National Flag Adoption Day. On 22 July 1947 the Constituent Assembly adopted India’s tricolour with the Ashoka Chakra.
articles.summary_hi: आज राष्ट्रीय ध्वज अंगीकरण दिवस है। 22 जुलाई 1947 को संविधान सभा ने अशोक चक्र युक्त तिरंगा अपनाया।
articles.content:
National Flag Adoption Day is observed on 22 July every year. On this day in 1947, the Constituent Assembly of India adopted the National Flag in its present form.

The flag is a horizontal tricolour of deep saffron (courage/sacrifice), white (peace/truth), and India green (faith/fertility), with the navy-blue Ashoka Chakra of 24 spokes in the centre representing dharma and movement.

Pingali Venkayya is credited with the design of the Indian National Flag. The ratio of the flag is 2:3.

For IB ACIO: date (22 July 1947), 24 spokes, ratio 2:3, and Pingali Venkayya are must-know facts.
articles.content_hi:
22 जुलाई 1947 — संविधान सभा ने राष्ट्रीय ध्वज अपनाया। केसरिया, सफेद, हरा + 24 तीलियों वाला अशोक चक्र।

अनुपात 2:3। Pingali Venkayya डिज़ाइन से जुड़े।

IB ACIO: 22 July 1947, 24 spokes, 2:3 — याद रखें।
articles.question: What is the official ratio of the width to the length of India’s National Flag?
articles.question_hi: भारत के राष्ट्रीय ध्वज की चौड़ाई और लंबाई का आधिकारिक अनुपात क्या है?
articles.explanation: The National Flag of India has a ratio of 2:3 (width:length).
articles.explanation_hi: भारत के राष्ट्रीय ध्वज का अनुपात 2:3 (चौड़ाई:लंबाई) है।
articles.moreInfo: Related: Flag Code of India, 2002 and Prevention of Insults to National Honour Act, 1971.
articles.moreInfo_hi: संबंधित: Flag Code 2002 और राष्ट्रीय सम्मान अपमान निवारण अधिनियम 1971।

articles.title: State Emblem of India — Lion Capital of Ashoka
articles.title_hi: भारत का राज्य चिह्न — अशोक की सिंह राजधानी
articles.summary: India’s State Emblem is an adaptation of the Lion Capital of Ashoka at Sarnath, adopted on 26 January 1950.
articles.summary_hi: भारत का राज्य चिह्न सारनाथ की अशोक सिंह राजधानी का रूपांतरण है, 26 जनवरी 1950 को अपनाया गया।
articles.content:
The State Emblem of India is adapted from the Lion Capital of Ashoka at Sarnath. It was adopted on 26 January 1950, the day India became a Republic.

The emblem shows three lions (the fourth is hidden), the Dharma Chakra, a bull and a horse, and the motto Satyameva Jayate (Truth Alone Triumphs) from the Mundaka Upanishad in Devanagari script.

The original Lion Capital is preserved at the Sarnath Museum near Varanasi. Using the emblem is regulated by the State Emblem of India (Prohibition of Improper Use) Act, 2005.

For IB ACIO: adopted 26 Jan 1950, Sarnath Lion Capital, and Satyameva Jayate motto.
articles.content_hi:
राज्य चिह्न: सारनाथ सिंह राजधानी। 26 जनवरी 1950 अपनाया।

सत्यमेव जयते (मुंडक उपनिषद)। अधिनियम 2005 अनुचित उपयोग रोकता है।

IB ACIO: 26 Jan 1950, Sarnath, Satyameva Jayate — याद रखें।
articles.question: India’s State Emblem was adopted on which date?
articles.question_hi: भारत का राज्य चिह्न किस तिथि को अपनाया गया?
articles.explanation: The State Emblem was adopted on 26 January 1950 along with the Republic.
articles.explanation_hi: राज्य चिह्न 26 जनवरी 1950 को गणतंत्र दिवस के साथ अपनाया गया।
articles.moreInfo: Today’s Flag Day pairs well with national symbols revision for exams.
articles.moreInfo_hi: आज के ध्वज दिवस के साथ राष्ट्रीय प्रतीक रिवीजन उपयोगी।

articles.title: ASEAN — India’s Act East Partner
articles.title_hi: आसियान — भारत की Act East साझेदारी
articles.summary: ASEAN has 10 Southeast Asian members with HQ in Jakarta. India is a Strategic Partner and drives Act East Policy through ASEAN.
articles.summary_hi: आसियान के 10 दक्षिण-पूर्व एशियाई सदस्य, HQ जकार्ता। भारत रणनीतिक साझेदार — Act East Policy।
articles.content:
The Association of Southeast Asian Nations (ASEAN) was founded in 1967. Members: Brunei, Cambodia, Indonesia, Laos, Malaysia, Myanmar, Philippines, Singapore, Thailand, and Vietnam.

ASEAN Secretariat is in Jakarta, Indonesia. India became a Sectoral Dialogue Partner (1992), Dialogue Partner (1996), and later a Strategic Partner. India’s Act East Policy (upgraded from Look East) centres on ASEAN centrality in the Indo-Pacific.

India–ASEAN engage via summits, FTA in goods, and maritime/security cooperation.

For IB ACIO: founded 1967, 10 members, HQ Jakarta, Act East–ASEAN link.
articles.content_hi:
ASEAN 1967, 10 सदस्य। HQ: Jakarta।

भारत: Act East Policy, ASEAN centrality।

IB ACIO: 1967, Jakarta, 10 सदस्य — याद रखें।
articles.question: Where is the ASEAN Secretariat located?
articles.explanation: The ASEAN Secretariat is located in Jakarta, Indonesia.
articles.explanation_hi: ASEAN सचिवालय जकार्ता, इंडोनेशिया में है।
articles.moreInfo_hi: तुलना: SAARC काठमांडू, BIMSTEC ढाका, SCO बीजिंग।

articles.title: PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana
articles.title_hi: पीएम सूर्य घर मुफ्त बिजली योजना
articles.summary: PM Surya Ghar aims to promote rooftop solar for households, reducing electricity bills and boosting clean energy capacity.
articles.summary_hi: पीएम सूर्य घर घरेलू रूफटॉप सोलर बढ़ावा देता है — बिजली बिल कम, स्वच्छ ऊर्जा क्षमता बढ़े।
articles.content:
PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana was launched to accelerate rooftop solar installation on residential buildings across India.

Households can get central financial assistance for installing rooftop solar systems, generate free/cheap electricity for self-use, and export surplus to the grid under net metering (as per state rules).

The scheme supports India’s renewable energy and climate goals and is implemented with involvement of the Ministry of New and Renewable Energy (MNRE).

For IB ACIO: rooftop solar for homes, MNRE link, and free/cheap electricity objective.
articles.content_hi:
PM Surya Ghar: घरेलू रूफटॉप सोलर। केंद्रीय वित्तीय सहायता।

MNRE से जुड़ा। अतिरिक्त बिजली ग्रिड को (नेट मीटरिंग)।

IB ACIO: rooftop solar, MNRE — याद रखें।
articles.question: PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana primarily promotes which technology for households?
articles.question_hi: पीएम सूर्य घर मुफ्त बिजली योजना घरों के लिए मुख्यतः किस तकनीक को बढ़ावा देती है?
articles.explanation: The scheme focuses on rooftop solar installations for residential consumers.
articles.explanation_hi: यह योजना आवासीय उपभोक्ताओं के लिए रूफटॉप सोलर पर केंद्रित है।
articles.moreInfo: Related: National Green Hydrogen Mission (10 July edition).
articles.moreInfo_hi: संबंधित: राष्ट्रीय हरित हाइड्रोजन मिशन (10 जुलाई)।

articles.title: CRR and SLR — Bank Reserve Requirements
articles.title_hi: CRR और SLR — बैंक आरक्षित आवश्यकताएं
articles.summary: CRR is cash kept with RBI; SLR is liquid assets (cash, gold, approved securities) banks must maintain — both are monetary tools.
articles.summary_hi: CRR: RBI के पास नकद। SLR: बैंकों को नकद/सोना/स्वीकृत प्रतिभूतियां रखनी होती हैं — दोनों मौद्रिक उपकरण।
articles.content:
Cash Reserve Ratio (CRR) is the percentage of a bank’s Net Demand and Time Liabilities (NDTL) that must be kept as cash with the Reserve Bank of India. CRR balances earn no interest.

Statutory Liquidity Ratio (SLR) is the percentage of NDTL that banks must maintain in liquid assets such as cash, gold, and approved government securities.

Raising CRR/SLR reduces funds available for lending (tightens liquidity); lowering them does the opposite. These are distinct from the repo rate set by the MPC.

For IB ACIO: CRR (cash with RBI), SLR (liquid assets), and both as % of NDTL.
articles.content_hi:
CRR: NDTL का नकद हिस्सा RBI के पास। ब्याज नहीं।

SLR: नकद/सोना/सरकारी प्रतिभूतियां। Repo से अलग।

IB ACIO: CRR vs SLR — याद रखें।
articles.question: Under CRR, banks keep a portion of deposits as cash with which institution?
articles.question_hi: CRR के तहत बैंक जमा का हिस्सा किस संस्था के पास नकद रखते हैं?
articles.explanation: CRR is the cash reserve that scheduled banks maintain with the RBI.
articles.explanation_hi: CRR वह नकद आरक्षित है जो अनुसूचित बैंक RBI के पास रखते हैं।
articles.moreInfo: Related: Repo vs Reverse Repo (20 July), MPC (17 July).

articles.title: INS Vikramaditya — India’s Aircraft Carrier
articles.title_hi: INS विक्रमादित्य — भारत का विमान वाहक
articles.summary: INS Vikramaditya is a Kiev-class carrier modified for India, acquired from Russia, and operates MiG-29K fighters.
articles.summary_hi: INS विक्रमादित्य रूस से प्राप्त संशोधित Kiev-class वाहक — MiG-29K संचालित करता है।
articles.content:
INS Vikramaditya is an aircraft carrier in service with the Indian Navy. It was originally the Soviet/Russian Admiral Gorshkov, extensively refurbished and inducted into the Indian Navy.

It operates MiG-29K fighter aircraft and various helicopters. Together with indigenous carrier INS Vikrant, India operates twin-carrier capability ambitions for both coasts and blue-water presence.

Vikramaditya uses a STOBAR (Short Take-Off But Arrested Recovery) configuration with a ski-jump.

For IB ACIO: origin (Russia/Admiral Gorshkov), MiG-29K, and contrast with indigenous INS Vikrant.
articles.content_hi:
Vikramaditya: पूर्व Admiral Gorshkov (रूस)। MiG-29K। STOBAR ski-jump।

स्वदेशी INS Vikrant से तुलना।

IB ACIO: रूस मूल, MiG-29K — याद रखें।
articles.question: INS Vikramaditya was originally which Russian/Soviet ship?
articles.question_hi: INS विक्रमादित्य मूल रूप से कौन सा रूसी/सोवियत जहाज था?
articles.explanation: INS Vikramaditya was converted from the Admiral Gorshkov for the Indian Navy.
articles.explanation_hi: INS विक्रमादित्य को भारतीय नौसेना के लिए Admiral Gorshkov से परिवर्तित किया गया।
articles.moreInfo: Related: INS Vikrant indigenous carrier (10 July edition).

articles.title: LVM3 (GSLV Mk III) — ISRO’s Heavy Lift Launcher
articles.title_hi: LVM3 (GSLV Mk III) — ISRO का भारी प्रक्षेपण यान
articles.summary: LVM3 is ISRO’s most powerful operational launcher, used for Chandrayaan-2/3 and Gaganyaan-related missions.
articles.summary_hi: LVM3 ISRO का सबसे शक्तिशाली परिचालन यान — Chandrayaan-2/3 और Gaganyaan संबंधित मिशन।
articles.content:
Launch Vehicle Mark-3 (LVM3), earlier called GSLV Mk III, is ISRO’s heavy-lift launch vehicle capable of placing ~4 tonne-class satellites into Geosynchronous Transfer Orbit (GTO).

It has three stages including solid boosters/core and a cryogenic upper stage (C25). LVM3 launched Chandrayaan-2 and Chandrayaan-3 and is the vehicle chosen for India’s human spaceflight programme (Gaganyaan).

Compared to PSLV (polar/remote sensing workhorse), LVM3 targets heavier GTO and human-rated missions.

For IB ACIO: heavy-lift, Chandrayaan-3 launcher, and Gaganyaan vehicle.
articles.content_hi:
LVM3 / GSLV Mk III: भारी लिफ्ट, ~4 टन GTO।

Chandrayaan-2/3, Gaganyaan यान। PSLV से भारी मिशन।

IB ACIO: LVM3, Chandrayaan-3, Gaganyaan — याद रखें।
articles.question: Which launcher carried Chandrayaan-3 to space?
articles.question_hi: चंद्रयान-3 को अंतरिक्ष में कौन से प्रक्षेपण यान ने ले गया?
articles.explanation: Chandrayaan-3 was launched aboard ISRO’s LVM3 (GSLV Mk III).
articles.explanation_hi: चंद्रयान-3 ISRO के LVM3 (GSLV Mk III) से प्रक्षेपित हुआ।
articles.moreInfo: Related: Chandrayaan-3 / Moon Day (20 July), PSLV (17 July).

articles.title: UNESCO World Heritage Sites — India’s Natural & Cultural Gems
articles.title_hi: यूनेस्को विश्व धरोहर स्थल — भारत की प्राकृतिक व सांस्कृतिक धरोहर
articles.summary: UNESCO World Heritage Sites are listed for outstanding universal value. India has a large number of cultural and natural sites.
articles.summary_hi: यूनेस्को विश्व धरोहर स्थल उत्कृष्ट सार्वभौमिक मूल्य के लिए सूचीबद्ध। भारत में अनेक सांस्कृतिक व प्राकृतिक स्थल।
articles.content:
The UNESCO World Heritage Convention (1972) identifies sites of Outstanding Universal Value. The World Heritage Committee decides inscriptions.

India’s list includes cultural sites (e.g., Taj Mahal, Qutub Minar, Ajanta/Ellora) and natural sites (e.g., Kaziranga, Sundarbans, Western Ghats, Great Himalayan National Park). Some sites are mixed.

Kaziranga is famous for the one-horned rhinoceros; Sundarbans for mangroves and the Royal Bengal Tiger.

For IB ACIO: Convention year (1972), difference between cultural/natural sites, and a few flagship Indian examples.
articles.content_hi:
UNESCO World Heritage Convention 1972। सांस्कृतिक व प्राकृतिक स्थल।

ताज महल, काजीरंगा, सुंदरबन, पश्चिमी घाट आदि।

IB ACIO: 1972, काजीरंगा (गैंडा) — याद रखें।
articles.question: The UNESCO World Heritage Convention was adopted in which year?
articles.question_hi: यूनेस्को विश्व धरोहर सम्मेलन किस वर्ष अपनाया गया?
articles.explanation: The World Heritage Convention was adopted by UNESCO in 1972.
articles.explanation_hi: विश्व धरोहर सम्मेलन UNESCO द्वारा 1972 में अपनाया गया।
articles.moreInfo: Same year as India’s Wildlife Protection Act, 1972 — useful memory link.
articles.moreInfo_hi: भारत का वन्यजीव अधिनियम भी 1972 — याद रखने में आसान।

articles.title: Vice-President of India — Ex-Officio Chairman of Rajya Sabha
articles.title_hi: भारत के उपराष्ट्रपति — राज्यसभा के पदेन सभापति
articles.summary: The Vice-President is elected by an electoral college of MPs and is the ex-officio Chairman of the Rajya Sabha (Article 63 onwards).
articles.summary_hi: उपराष्ट्रपति सांसदों के निर्वाचक मंडल से चुने जाते हैं और राज्यसभा के पदेन सभापति होते हैं।
articles.content:
Article 63 provides for a Vice-President of India. The Vice-President is elected by members of both Houses of Parliament (elected + nominated) by proportional representation with single transferable vote — State Assemblies do not vote (unlike the President’s election).

The Vice-President is the ex-officio Chairman of the Rajya Sabha. Term is five years. The Vice-President acts as President when the office is vacant (until a new President is elected).

Removal is by a Rajya Sabha resolution approved by Lok Sabha (effective majority conditions as per Constitution).

For IB ACIO: electoral college (Parliament only), Chairman of Rajya Sabha, 5-year term.
articles.content_hi:
धारा 63 — उपराष्ट्रपति। चुनाव: केवल संसद के सदस्य।

राज्यसभा के पदेन सभापति। कार्यकाल 5 वर्ष।

IB ACIO: Parliament only electorate, Rajya Sabha Chairman — याद रखें।
articles.question: Who is the ex-officio Chairman of the Rajya Sabha?
articles.question_hi: राज्यसभा के पदेन सभापति कौन होते हैं?
articles.explanation: The Vice-President of India is the ex-officio Chairman of the Rajya Sabha.
articles.explanation_hi: भारत के उपराष्ट्रपति राज्यसभा के पदेन सभापति होते हैं।
articles.moreInfo: Contrast President’s electoral college which includes State MLAs (21 July edition).
articles.moreInfo_hi: तुलना: राष्ट्रपति चुनाव में राज्य विधायक भी (21 जुलाई)।

articles.title: Kargil Vijay Diwas — 26 July (Countdown)
articles.summary: Kargil Vijay Diwas on 26 July commemorates India’s victory in the 1999 Kargil War under Operation Vijay.
articles.summary_hi: 26 जुलाई कारगिल विजय दिवस — 1999 कारगिल युद्ध में Operation Vijay के तहत भारत की विजय।
articles.content:
Kargil Vijay Diwas is observed on 26 July to mark the successful end of the Kargil War (1999). The Indian Army’s Operation Vijay and the IAF’s Operation Safed Sagar evicted intruders from high Himalayan posts in the Kargil sector.

The conflict highlighted the importance of surveillance, high-altitude warfare, and national resolve. Param Vir Chakra awardees from the war include Capt. Vikram Batra and Capt. Manoj Kumar Pandey, among others.

Dras and Tololing are among the well-known battle locations associated with the war in public memory.

For IB ACIO: 26 July, 1999, Operation Vijay, Operation Safed Sagar.
articles.content_hi:
26 जुलाई — Operation Vijay (1999)। IAF: Operation Safed Sagar।

Param Vir Chakra वीर। IB ACIO: 26 July, 1999 — याद रखें।
articles.question: Operation Safed Sagar during the Kargil War was conducted by which force?
articles.question_hi: कारगिल युद्ध में Operation Safed Sagar किस बल ने चलाया?
articles.explanation: Operation Safed Sagar was the Indian Air Force’s operation during the Kargil War.
articles.explanation_hi: Operation Safed Sagar कारगिल युद्ध में भारतीय वायुसेना का अभियान था।
articles.moreInfo: Related preview: 19 July edition. Vijay Diwas (16 Dec) is for the 1971 war.
articles.moreInfo_hi: संबंधित: 19 जुलाई पूर्वावलोकन। 16 दिसंबर = 1971 विजय दिवस।
